title: MTBackpack Preview
description: This mod provides compatibility for servers running MTBackpacks to display a preview of the backpack contents when hovering over them inside the inventory.
body:
![Main Image](https://panel.masecla.dev/api/v1/image/638a95f4aa2989386ab8ef7d)

Full transcript # MTBackpack Preview Enable preview for your backpacks directly from your inventory! ## Installation ### Prior to 1.12 1. Install Legacy Fabric 2. Download the Legacy Fabric API 3. Download the MTBackpackPreview ### After 1.14 1. Install Fabric 2. Download the Fabric API 3. Download the MTBackpackPreview MTBackpacks Preview has been carefully backported to all Minecraft versions to ensure everyone is able to use it.
# Links: [MTBackpacks on Spigot](https://panel.masecla.dev/link/MTBackpack.5401326/) [Legacy Fabric](https://legacyfabric.net/downloads.html) [Legacy Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-fabric-api) [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net) [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
